prompt:
[Main Subject]
A large, highly recognizable silhouette of a figure (head, face outline, or outer contour) fills the upper portion of the frame as the dominant visual shape. Within the lower and middle area, the same character appears in full body, standing still or in subtle motion, serving as the secondary focal point and visual core.

[Composition]
Double exposure and collage storytelling lives inside and around the large silhouette: multiple scenes, layered imagery, smaller character moments, supporting elements, and environmental layers blend together within clouds, ink wash, and whitewash. Side panels on the left and right echo each other, adding narrative tension and spatial rhythm. A flowing thread of visual cues links the main figure, internal collage, and surrounding silhouette, guiding the eye through the composition.

[Style]
A large portion of the canvas is left as negative white space. Edges are softened with ink stains, frayed brushwork, and dissolving textures, evoking the breath and emptiness of Oriental aesthetics. Overall mood: cohesive, refined, restrained, emphasizing layered storytelling, serialized poster language, and a strong central visual impact.

Aspect ratio: 9:16.
